steps.t: A trail of very large footprints has been made through Gárnoth's Farm. They seem to originate from the north, near the road coming from Forlaw....
The path of footprints made by Núrzum start near the road from Forlaw toward Gárnoth's Farm. There appears to be a trail made by Núrzum recently. The …

The next in the path of footprints made by Núrzum is in the north-east corner of Gárnoth's Farm. There appears to be a trail made by Núrzum recently. …
